I've always been fascinated by one question:
why do people do what they do?

Scroll to explore ↓

About

Where
Psychology
Meets
Marketing

That curiosity led me to study marketing — not for the ads or the campaigns, but for the psychology behind every decision, every reaction, every moment someone chooses one thing over another.

Along the way, I built things. A startup. A store. Not because I had to — because I needed to test my thinking in the real world.

I'm a final-year Marketing student at the University of Bahrain, trained in behavioral influence, digital strategy, and driven by a genuine curiosity about how people think, decide, and act.

Experience

INJAZ Bahrain

Marketing Team Member

2021 · Manama, Bahrain

Co-led the marketing strategy of a student-run sustainability startup that transformed discarded tires and materials into modern home furniture. Handled brand positioning, visual identity, and pitch presentation — competing in INJAZ Bahrain's qualifying round against university teams across the Kingdom.

Brand Strategy Entrepreneurship Sustainability Pitch & Presentation

Bahrain Authority for Culture & Antiquities

Field Archaeologist

2023 · Buri, Bahrain

Worked as part of a structured field team at an active archaeological excavation site in Budaiya. Contributed to systematic site documentation, artifact handling, and data recording — three months of rigorous fieldwork that sharpened discipline, adaptability, and precision under demanding conditions.
